creator: andreas@bilke.org
text:
Created attachment 208818
Update to 0.15.0

Attached see the update to v0.15.0 . The original author of py-khard does not upload his versions to pypi anymore.

This patch switches to github as a master site and applies some fixes to make it build on FreeBSD.

The build dev of gmake is necessary because the Makefile for man page generation uses GNU make features.
